0.06854837051511263
Minimum distance in box units (L_box=1) between particles in the initial configuration is: 0.177 between particles 22 and 41
This is compared to length of σ in box units which is: 0.133

           Starting SEGC Wang Landau Simulation        
Due to the occurence of Λ in the metropolis criterion, this simulation cannot be fully carried out for lennard jonesium and is here specific to Argon
